question_prompt: Q6: If your employer banned the use of AI at work, how would it impact you?
panels: Q6: I would continue to use AI tools at work and on company devices.
Q6: I would need to find alternative ways to complete tasks without AI.
Q6: I would no longer be able to complete my tasks and would have to change jobs.
Q6: I would still use AI for my job outside of work hours or on a personal device.
Q6: I would support the ban and prefer to work without AI tools.
Q6: It would have no effect as I don’t use AI tools.
Q6: It would make me less efficient at my job and slow down my productivity.
